commands.review_summary:
The PR changes bundled web provider public-artifact collection to catch individual throwing factory exports, keep healthy sibling providers, throw when no matching factory survives, and add focused regressions.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +50. Total +72 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main calls each matching factory without a per-factory catch, and the PR body records a focused before/after regression where a throwing factory used to abort discovery.
commands.review_followup: - No automated code repair is needed; the maintainer-labeled draft PR needs normal maintainer review plus completed changed-gate proof.

target.title: fix(plugins): isolate web provider factory failures
target.body:
## Summary

- isolates bundled web provider public-artifact factory projection so one throwing exported factory is skipped instead of hiding healthy sibling providers
- keeps broken single-provider artifacts loud by rethrowing an initialization error when no valid matching provider survives
- adds neutral `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` regressions for the partial-failure and all-factories-fail paths

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/web-provider-public-artifacts.explicit-fast-path.test.ts --reporter=verbose` failed before the fix with `fuzzplugin web provider factory failed`, then passed after the fix: 1 shard / 5 tests
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/plugins/web-provider-public-artifacts.explicit.ts src/plugins/web-provider-public-artifacts.explicit-fast-path.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json src/plugins/web-provider-public-artifacts.explicit.ts src/plugins/web-provider-public-artifacts.explicit-fast-path.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- added-line private-name scrub returned no reported private plugin/tool names
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean: no accepted/actionable findings
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider azure --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` timed out waiting for Azure lease `violet-hermit` / `cbx_ff715cb33518` after 10m; follow-up `crabbox stop` returned 404/not_found, so no lease was left to release

## Current CI note

This PR is intentionally still draft until broad changed-gate proof completes. The focused regression and review are clean; the remaining gap is remote `pnpm check:changed` capacity/proof, not code churn.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a broken bundled web provider public-artifact factory can no longer make explicit web provider discovery fail before healthy sibling provider factories are projected.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree `fuzz-plugin-sdk-entrypoints-20260601` rebased onto `origin/main` at `bb673f47b20`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused Vitest regression before and after the fix, then reran focused Vitest, oxfmt, oxlint, diff check, private-name scrub, and structured autoreview.

Evidence after fix: the focused regression now skips the throwing `fuzzplugin` factory and still returns the healthy `mockplugin` web-search provider from the same public artifact module; a plugin artifact with only throwing matching factories now raises `Unable to initialize web providers for plugin fuzzplugin`.

Observed result after fix: healthy web provider entries remain discoverable while broken single-provider artifacts keep failing loudly instead of silently falling back as if no public artifact existed.

What was not tested: full repository suite, completed `pnpm check:changed`, or live external plugin process.
target.author: vincentkoc
